response.original_title: Rush: Grace Under Pressure (Super Deluxe Edition)
response.overview: The Grace Under Pressure studio album is newly mixed by Richard Chycki in Dolby Atmos & 5.1 surround from the original album multi-tracks, Terry Brown's new album mix is presented in high-resolution stereo, along with the band's 4 music videos are visually remastered in HD and featured in 5.1 surround and stereo.  The 1986 concert home video Grace Under Pressure Tour only featured a portion of the show performed on September 21, 1984 in Toronto, now for the first-time ever the complete concert is presented newly mixed from the original multi-track audio masters and with a newly edited concert video from the camera masters featuring over 37 minutes of additional performances. Newly titled Grace Under Pressure Tour: Live in Toronto 1984, the concert video newly remastered in HD and offered in Dolby Atmos, 5.1 surround and stereo newly mixed by Terry Brown on the Blu-ray
response.title: Rush: Grace Under Pressure (Super Deluxe Edition)
